Done! I've added the `stripHtmlTags` function in `src/utils/sanitize.ts`. **Usage:** ```typescript import { stripHtmlTags } from '@/utils/sanitize'; const clean = stripHtmlTags('
Hello World
'); // 'Hello World' const raw = stripHtmlTags('No tags here'); ``` The function uses a simple regex to remove any content between `<` and `>` characters. If you need additional sanitization later (like escaping special characters), this file would be a good place to add those helpers as well.
